description: A model call runs with no timeout and unbounded retries, so a hang or error storm exhausts latency budget, rate limits, or spend.
body: Failure mode: the call has no per-request timeout and retries on any error without a cap or backoff, so a slow upstream or a transient 5xx triggers a retry storm and runaway cost. Detection signals: no timeout configured; retry loop without a cap or jitter; no token/cost ceiling; no metric for retries or spend. Do not retry terminal 4xx errors or leave a call able to hang indefinitely. Safer fallback: set a per-call timeout, cap retries with exponential backoff and jitter, classify retryable vs terminal errors, and enforce a max-token/cost ceiling that fails closed.
